info.name: Serverless AI Text Summarization Pipeline
info.description:
Test collection for the Serverless AI Text Summarization Pipeline.

Setup:
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Click the collection name → Variables tab
3. Set `base_url` to your API Gateway URL (from `sam deploy` output)
4. Run POST /summarize first, copy the `id` from the response
5. Paste that `id` into the GET /summary/{id} request

variable.description: Replace with the API Gateway URL from `sam deploy` output
Paste the `id` returned from POST /summarize here to use in the GET request

request.description: Submits text to the pipeline. Returns a summary, sentiment label, and a unique `id` for later retrieval.

response.name: Example Response

request.description: Retrieves a previously stored summarization result by its ID. Use the `id` returned from POST /summarize.

response.name: Example Response
response.body:
{
  "id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",
  "original_text": "Artificial intelligence (AI) is transforming...",
  "summary": "AI is rapidly transforming industries by automating tasks and personalizing experiences, but raises concerns about privacy, bias, and labor.",
  "sentiment": "neutral",
  "timestamp": "2025-09-15T14:23:01.123456+00:00"
}
